case_title: SERGEI LIMANSKY VS. LAWTON M COSTELLO

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-27-2016 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF DEFENDANT TO OCT-05-2016 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506 FOR FURTHER HEARING ON DEFENDANT'S REQUEST TO CONSOLIDATE THIS CASE WITH THE MATTER ENTITLED LAWTON COSTELLO VS. SAN FRANCISCO INDEPENDENT TAXI ASSOCIATION, ET AL., SAN FRANCISCO SUPERIOR COURT NUMBER CGC-16-550196. APPEARANCES BY PLAINTIFF SERGIE LIMANSKY & DEFENDANT LAWTON COSTELLO. GEORGE ANTONE WAS PLACED UNDER OATH AND SERVED AS RUSSIAN SPEAKING INTERPRETER FOR PLAINTIFF. PROOF OF SERVICE ON FILE. EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: K. DOUGHERTY. NOT REPORTED. (D514).
AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY LIMANSKY, SERGEI AS TO DEFENDANT COSTELLO, LAWTON M ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-27-2016 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
COPYING FEES (5 PAGE) PAID BY PLAINTIFF LIMANSKY, SERGEI
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED SEP-12-2016, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT COSTELLO, LAWTON M
COURT ORDERED TRANSFER TO SAN FRANCISCO SUPERIOR COURT - UNLIMITED JURISDICTION
CORRESPONDENCE DEFENDANT REQUESTS THAT SMALL CLAIMS CASE JOIN CASE NO. CGC-16-550196 RECEIVED BY DEFENDANT COSTELLO, LAWTON M

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-05-2016 IS OFF CALENDAR, TRANSFER TO UNLIMITED JURISDICTION (SF). APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF SERGEI LIMANSKY AND DEFENDANT LAWTON M. COSTELLO. DEFENDANT MR. COSTELLO WAIVES PROCESS OF SERVICE DUE TO BEING SERVED IMPROPER. DEFENDANT'S MOTION TO JOIN CGC-16-550196 IS GRANTED. THE COURT ORDERED THIS MATTER TRANSFERRED TO JOIN SUPERIOR COURT CASE CGC-16-550196, UNLIMITED JURISDICTION. TODAY'S HEARING IS VACATED. EXHIBITS RETAINED. NOTICES MAILED TO BOTH PARTIES. JUDGE DONALD S. MITCHELL, CLERK J. RUMSEY, NOT REPORTED. (506)
RECEIVED NOTICE OF FILING AND TRANSMITTAL FROM SUPERIOR COURT OF CALIFORNIA, COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO CIVIL-UNLIMITED JURISDICTION
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED JAN-03-2017 ORDERED DESTROYED
ADDED TO EXHIBIT DESTRUCTION REPORT OF JAN-03-2017
